name: Motors 75 Plus
notes: Address confirmed as 528 Main St E, Saint Stephen MN 56375 via Yelp and Google (not St. Cloud as listed in task — Saint Stephen is a small town approximately 10 miles northwest of St. Cloud). motors75plus.com returns Cloudflare JS challenge to non-browser clients. CarGurus dealer page sp407189 returned 6 active listings with full detail. CarGurus lists phone as (320) 433-6227 but dealer's own site and Google Business list (320) 492-6977 — task-provided number used. Inventory sourced from CarGurus. 6 vehicles is likely the complete current lot based on search snippets indicating prices starting at $4,975.

titleAudit.note: CarGurus history section shows 'Clean title / No issues reported' on all 4 sampled listings (Buick Regal, Cobalt, GMC Terrain, Hummer H2, INFINITI QX80); no rebuilt or salvage flagged across the 6-vehicle lot.
